description:
Offline Kochi Metro route planner and fare calculator. Fast, Free & Private.
Kochi Transit Go is the definitive, privacy-respecting transit companion for the Kochi Metro system. Built from the ground up as a native Android app, it provides instantaneous access to train schedules, routes, and fare calculations without ever requiring an internet connection.

Features:
- Offline Mode: All official GTFS schedules are bundled locally. Plan trips even deep underground.
- Instant Fare Calculator: Know exactly how much your trip will cost before you reach the station.
- GPS Station Locator: Automatically detects the nearest metro station using your device's location.
- Live Tracker: See upcoming departures and platform directions.
- Privacy First: No analytics, no ad trackers, and no unnecessary permissions. Your location data stays on your device.

This app is fully open-source under the MIT License and uses official Kochi Metro Open GTFS data.
